hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: I build robust systems integrating Next.js interfaces with Node.js APIs. Focused on clean architecture, data integrity, and performance.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Computer Engineering undergraduate at Eduardo Mondlane University (UEM) with a strong interest in Full-Stack Development, DevOps, and Network Infrastructure. I build web applications using modern technologies such as React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL, with a focus on clean architecture, maintainable code, and scalable solutions.
about.p2: Alongside software development, I have experience working with Linux systems, Docker, networking fundamentals, and Cisco technologies, allowing me to bridge the gap between application development and infrastructure operations. One of my notable projects is BorraPassar!, a full-stack web application developed with Node.js, Express, Prisma, React, and Next.js, where I contributed to system architecture, backend development, frontend implementation, and API integration.
about.p3: I am currently seeking internship and entry-level opportunities where I can further develop my skills in Software Engineering, DevOps, Cloud and Infrastructure, while contributing to the design and delivery of reliable, secure, and scalable technology solutions.
